# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Shell commands for build step (runs with bash -eo pipefail). Example: ./scripts/build.sh'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Shell commands for deploy step (runs with bash -eo pipefail). Example: ./scripts/deploy.sh'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      runner_labels:
        description: 'JSON array of runner labels. Example: ["self-hosted","linux","datacenter"]'
        required: false
        default: '["self-hosted","linux","datacenter"]'
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory relative to repo root'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'GitHub Environment name (optional)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Job timeout in minutes'
        required: false
        default: '120'
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: datacenter-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    name: Build and Deploy (Self-hosted)
    runs-on: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.runner_labels) }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment != '' && inputs.environment || null }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash --noprofile --norc -eo pipefail {0}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Preflight
        run: |
          echo "Runner: $RUNNER_NAME"
          echo "OS: $RUNNER_OS"
          echo "Workspace: $GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
          echo "Working directory: $PWD"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"

      - name: Build (custom)
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ${{
            inputs.build_script
          }}

      - name: Deploy (custom)
        if: ${{ inputs.deploy_script != '' }}
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ${{
            inputs.deploy_script
          }}
